_doc: Faithful replay: ConnectorActivity faults with System.AggregateException wrapping an inner GeneralException DAP-GE-3000 (Bad Gateway during connection resolution — transient). The agent must unwrap InnerExceptions[0]. Signature mined from telemetry. First-match-wins.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.

expected_calls.description: Agent lists faulted jobs in the Shared folder to find the failing job (prompt gives no job key).
Agent fetches the faulted job to read the AggregateException and its inner GeneralException DAP-GE-3000 (Bad Gateway).
